prompt: Help me set up collaboration docs for a UX research project. I'm writing a research report on pain points in food delivery apps. I've done 10 user interviews and have a survey with 150 responses. My role is the researcher — I make all decisions about the report structure and conclusions. AI helps me draft and revise the writing. The report needs to be done in 2 weeks. Already decided: report will be in English, max 15 pages, structured as: Executive Summary → Methodology → Findings → Recommendations.

assertions.name: No inappropriate code terminology
assertions.text: Documents do not use terms like 'tech stack', 'refactor', 'deploy', 'data model' inappropriately for a writing project

assertions.name: Report structure logged in DECISIONS.md
assertions.text: DECISIONS.md includes the 4-section structure (Executive Summary, Methodology, Findings, Recommendations)

assertions.name: CONTEXT.md reflects research phase
assertions.text: CONTEXT.md mentions interviews completed, survey data, or writing phase
